this evening at the rooms of the
music store. The affair promises
to be an interesting event, not only
for the reason that number of
local artists will appear but because
Of the splendid program which has
been arranged for the occasion.


Fifty guests will be entertained
at the Mcclure home on Augusta
avenue today, when Mrs. Mcclure
and Mrs. Conrad Bluhm will be
hostesses at the second of a series
Of affairs given by them this week
The ladies will spend the afternoon
hours with sewing.


& & 4


The economics department of the
Woman's club is holding an open
meeting this afternoon at the par
lors of the Universalist church. The
meeting is being for the discussion
of the day nursery and addresses
will be made by Miss Hornberg, the
visiting nurse, and Mrs Blanche H.
Mason, assistant state labor COM
missioner.





The International Brotherhood of
Electrical Workers will entertain
at a dancing party this evening at
the Ells' temple. Special electrical
decorations have been arranged and
the affair will undoubtedly be we'll
attended
